packs.name: okpack-competitive
packs.domain: competitive / market intelligence for ANY tracked market — competitors, products, segments, deals, signals (method-only; identity supplied at deploy)

packs.name: okpack-ai-research
packs.domain: AI / LLM research watch — models, labs, techniques, benchmarks, predictions

packs.name: okpack-vendor-risk
packs.domain: vendor / supply-chain risk — vendors, products, components, contracts, incidents; risk ranking against an operator dependency profile (okengine#174)

packs.name: okpack-cti
packs.domain: security / threat-intel (STIX-aligned) — a composed bundle of the CTI packs

packs.name: okpack-threat-actors
packs.domain: Threat-actor / adversary tracking from open-source threat intelligence (ATT&CK, MISP, CERT/vendor reporting)

packs.name: okpack-vuln
packs.domain: Actively-exploited vulnerability (CVE) tracking from CISA KEV

packs.name: okpack-threat-landscape
packs.domain: Threat-landscape intelligence from annual security reports

packs.name: okpack-indicators
packs.domain: Atomic indicators (IOCs) + adversary infrastructure — abuse.ch URLhaus seed

packs.name: okpack-detections
packs.domain: Detections (Sigma) + ATT&CK mitigations — SigmaHQ seed, ATT&CK-technique coverage

packs.name: okpack-incidents
packs.domain: Security incidents + the identities involved — VERIS Community Database seed
